goal: Close the next concrete gap in the real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint blocker by adding a standalone Docker image handoff for the real trained adapter. The handoff must create or describe a digest-pinned Docker build context/image for mib-export:test from a real adapter root, keep fake-backend mode forbidden, integrate into the existing CUDA training handoff before the RC handoff, and keep current local release state NOT_GO.
head: 755e73d
blocked_scope: Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
Weakening real adapter intake, endpoint, M6, bundle, or v0 release evidence acceptance
Changing runtime templates instead of reusing them
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add a standalone Docker handoff script, integrate it into the existing CUDA training handoff, add focused script tests, regenerate review artifacts, and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick --json-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.json --markdown-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.md --shell-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.sh
required_evidence: Docker image handoff shell refuses fake backend mode and requires a digest-pinned base image before docker build
Docker image handoff points to mib-export:test and validates docker image inspect after build
Materialized test context validates export manifest and agent contract using existing runtime templates without committing adapters
CUDA training handoff invokes Docker image handoff before downstream RC handoff
Current v0 readiness remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the release blocker
executed_verification_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick --json-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.json --markdown-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.md --shell-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.sh
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO until this Docker handoff is run on a real CUDA host with a real trained adapter and no-fake endpoint evidence.
This gate prepares Docker image handoff artifacts only and does not build or commit a Docker image in the current host.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped Docker image handoff gate after confirming the current external CUDA training handoff can create an adapter, but the downstream RC handoff still requires mib-export:test and the current Docker daemon does not have that image.
phase_notes.audit: Confirmed the downstream RC handoff still requires mib-export:test and current local readiness remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker.
phase_notes.build: Added scripts/prepare_real_adapter_docker_image.py, integrated prepare_docker_image into scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py before RC handoff, and added focused script tests.
phase_notes.check: Regenerated Docker and CUDA training handoff artifacts, validated JSON and shell syntax, confirmed required guard strings, reran v0 readiness as NOT_GO, and reran m1-smoke --skip-install successfully.
phase_notes.done: Phase complete as a handoff-only gate. It prepares digest-pinned Docker image creation for a future real adapter run and does not claim M6-RC or v0 release GO.

pabcd.approved_scope: Standalone Docker image handoff script, CUDA training handoff integration, focused tests, review evidence, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product runtime/API/UI/DB/schema/training behavior changes, no model artifacts, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
pabcd.plan: Open scoped Docker image handoff gate after confirming the current external CUDA training handoff can create an adapter, but the downstream RC handoff still requires mib-export:test and the current Docker daemon does not have that image.
pabcd.audit: Confirmed the downstream RC handoff still requires mib-export:test and current local readiness remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker.
pabcd.build: Added scripts/prepare_real_adapter_docker_image.py, integrated prepare_docker_image into scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py before RC handoff, and added focused script tests.
pabcd.check: Regenerated Docker and CUDA training handoff artifacts, validated JSON and shell syntax, confirmed required guard strings, reran v0 readiness as NOT_GO, and reran m1-smoke --skip-install successfully.
pabcd.done: Phase complete as a handoff-only gate. It prepares digest-pinned Docker image creation for a future real adapter run and does not claim M6-RC or v0 release GO.
